default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Swoogo and GrowthX to discuss SEO strategy, marketing automation, and lead generation improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/F1W3q6ztdynNBw3dBkDGbcuCJBPVSiiy?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SEO efforts showing positive results with increasing traffic and clicks](https://fathom.video/share/F1W3q6ztdynNBw3dBkDGbcuCJBPVSiiy?tab=summary&timestamp=517.0)
  - [Need to implement better tracking (e.g., RB2B) to measure ICP quality and ROI](https://fathom.video/share/F1W3q6ztdynNBw3dBkDGbcuCJBPVSiiy?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)
  - [Opportunity to leverage blog traffic for email nurturing and paid retargeting](https://fathom.video/share/F1W3q6ztdynNBw3dBkDGbcuCJBPVSiiy?tab=summary&timestamp=461.0)
  - [Potential to significantly reduce CAC through cold email outreach (≈$5/meeting)](https://fathom.video/share/F1W3q6ztdynNBw3dBkDGbcuCJBPVSiiy?tab=summary&timestamp=1522.0)

## Topics

### SEO Progress and Reporting

  - [Impressions and clicks increasing week-over-week](https://fathom.video/share/F1W3q6ztdynNBw3dBkDGbcuCJBPVSiiy?tab=summary&timestamp=517.0)
  - [Content ranking for relevant keywords (e.g., event planning checklist, virtual event planning)](https://fathom.video/share/F1W3q6ztdynNBw3dBkDGbcuCJBPVSiiy?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Need for visual reporting to present to CEO/CRO (Google Doc or deck requested)](https://fathom.video/share/F1W3q6ztdynNBw3dBkDGbcuCJBPVSiiy?tab=summary&timestamp=571.0)
  - [Discussion on tracking rankings for key terms like "event registration" and "event management"](https://fathom.video/share/F1W3q6ztdynNBw3dBkDGbcuCJBPVSiiy?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)

### Lead Tracking and Nurturing

  - [Plan to implement RB2B for better lead tracking and ICP scoring](https://fathom.video/share/F1W3q6ztdynNBw3dBkDGbcuCJBPVSiiy?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)
  - [Potential to create HubSpot audiences based on blog visitors and pricing page views](https://fathom.video/share/F1W3q6ztdynNBw3dBkDGbcuCJBPVSiiy?tab=summary&timestamp=461.0)
  - [Opportunity to use email nurturing for blog visitors (even without opt-in)](https://fathom.video/share/F1W3q6ztdynNBw3dBkDGbcuCJBPVSiiy?tab=summary&timestamp=971.0)
  - [Current manual process for account finding; suggestion to use tools like Clay for efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/F1W3q6ztdynNBw3dBkDGbcuCJBPVSiiy?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)

### Marketing Automation and Cold Outreach

  - [Swoogo not currently using email for marketing nurtures](https://fathom.video/share/F1W3q6ztdynNBw3dBkDGbcuCJBPVSiiy?tab=summary&timestamp=1240.0)
  - [Recommendation to set up cold email campaigns using multiple domains for better deliverability](https://fathom.video/share/F1W3q6ztdynNBw3dBkDGbcuCJBPVSiiy?tab=summary&timestamp=1205.0)
  - [Potential to use AI-powered tools for personalized outreach at scale](https://fathom.video/share/F1W3q6ztdynNBw3dBkDGbcuCJBPVSiiy?tab=summary&timestamp=1301.0)
  - [Discussion on whether SDRs or marketing should handle these tools](https://fathom.video/share/F1W3q6ztdynNBw3dBkDGbcuCJBPVSiiy?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)

### Cost Per Acquisition (CAC) Optimization

  - [Current paid advertising spend: \>$500k/year with 17% MQL to SQL conversion](https://fathom.video/share/F1W3q6ztdynNBw3dBkDGbcuCJBPVSiiy?tab=summary&timestamp=1502.0)
  - Cold email outreach could potentially reduce cost per meeting booked to \<$5
  - [Opportunity to diversify lead sources and reduce reliance on paid advertising](https://fathom.video/share/F1W3q6ztdynNBw3dBkDGbcuCJBPVSiiy?tab=summary&timestamp=1568.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Mitchel to work with Will on compliance for implementing RB2B tracking](https://fathom.video/share/F1W3q6ztdynNBw3dBkDGbcuCJBPVSiiy?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
  - [Jimmy to help create slides explaining SEO roadmap and content program scaling](https://fathom.video/share/F1W3q6ztdynNBw3dBkDGbcuCJBPVSiiy?tab=summary&timestamp=599.0)
  - [Explore implementation of Clay or similar tool for efficient account finding and email extraction](https://fathom.video/share/F1W3q6ztdynNBw3dBkDGbcuCJBPVSiiy?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Investigate setting up marketing nurture sequences in HubSpot](https://fathom.video/share/F1W3q6ztdynNBw3dBkDGbcuCJBPVSiiy?tab=summary&timestamp=1240.0)
  - [Consider piloting a cold email outreach program to reduce CAC](https://fathom.video/share/F1W3q6ztdynNBw3dBkDGbcuCJBPVSiiy?tab=summary&timestamp=1522.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up discussion on contract renewal (potentially with Marcel)](https://fathom.video/share/F1W3q6ztdynNBw3dBkDGbcuCJBPVSiiy?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)

action_items.description: Set up internal reporting on SEO progress (clicks, impressions, rankings)
Work w/ Will on compliance approval for installing RB2B tracking
Prepare slides/doc on SEO roadmap (top to bottom funnel) for Stacey to present to CEO/CRO
Review HubSpot capabilities for creating audiences from blog visitors who didn't submit forms
